reasoning: AT&T's stock dropped from $25.48 to $24.08 over two days following an October 22, 2025 earnings report where EPS matched expectations but revenue missed by $190 million. Due to this bounce, a $20 billion share buyback program for 2025-2027, and historically consistent upward drift in equities, my estimated probabilities are skewed positively. However, because telecom revenues are currently under scrutiny and AT&T showed downward momentum in the months leading up to earnings, there's significant noise going forward.
